# Bug report

Thanks for taking the time to file this. Please include as much of the
following as you can.

## Summary

A short (one or two sentence) description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Screenshots / screen recordings help a lot.

## Environment

- OS / browser:
- Node / pnpm version:
- Commit / branch (`git rev-parse HEAD`):
- `pnpm lockfile` last updated:

## Logs / stack traces

<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

```
paste here
```

</details>

## Severity

- [ ] Blocker (can't use the app)
- [ ] Major (feature broken, workaround exists)
- [ ] Minor / cosmetic
- [ ] I'm not sure
